10: | `e2e.yml` | Agentcube E2E Tests | `pull_request` ŌåÆ `main`, `release-*` | *(none)* | `e2e-test` | Checkout; Go 1.23; `helm/kind-action@v1` **install_only** Kind v0.30.0, `cluster_name: agentcube-e2e`; `export ARTIFACTS_PATH=${{ github.workspace }}/e2e-logs`; `make e2e`; on failure upload `e2e-logs/`; `always` ŌåÆ `make e2e-clean` | `ARTIFACTS_PATH` (shell) | ŌĆö |
11: | `lint.yml` | Lint | `pull_request` ŌåÆ `main`, `release-*` | `lint`: `**/*.go`, `go.mod`, `go.sum`, `.golangci.yml`, `.github/workflows/lint.yml` | `golangci` | Checkout; paths-filter; if changed: Go 1.24; `make lint` | ŌĆö | ŌĆö |
12: | `python-sdk-tests.yml` | Python SDK Tests | `pull_request`, `merge_group` | `sdk`: `sdk-python/**` | `python-sdk-tests` | Checkout; paths-filter; if changed: Python 3.12 in `sdk-python/`; `pip install pytest`; `pip install -e .`; `python -m pytest tests/ -v` | Default `working-directory: sdk-python` | ŌĆö |
13: | `python-lint.yml` | Python Lint | `pull_request` ŌåÆ `main`, `release-*` | `python`: `cmd/cli/**`, `sdk-python/**`, `example/**`, `test/**/*.py`, `pyproject.toml`, workflow self | `python_lint` | Checkout; paths-filter; if changed: Python 3.10; `pip install ruff`; `ruff check . --config pyproject.toml` | ŌĆö | ŌĆö |
14: | `test-coverage.yml` | Test Coverage | `pull_request`, `merge_group`, `workflow_call` | `coverage`: `**` minus `*.md`, `*.svg`, `*.png` | `coverage` | Checkout; paths-filter; if changed: free disk space; Go 1.24; `go test` with coverage; step summary; Codecov upload; artifact `go-coverage` | `CODECOV_TOKEN` passed to Codecov action when present | `secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN` (optional; declared for `workflow_call`) |
15: | `codegen-check.yml` | Codegen Check | `pull_request` ŌåÆ `main`, `release-*` | `codegen`: `pkg/apis/**`, `hack/**`, `.github/workflows/**`, `Makefile` | `codegen-check` | Checkout; paths-filter; if changed: Go 1.24.4; `make gen-check` | ŌĆö | ŌĆö |
16: | `copyright-check.yml` | Copyright Check | `pull_request` ŌåÆ `main`, `release-*` | `copyright`: all files except `*.md`, `*.svg`, `*.png`, `docs/**`, `.github/**` | `build` | Checkout; paths-filter; if changed: `apt install moreutils`; `make gen-copyright`; `git diff --exit-code` | ŌĆö | ŌĆö |
17: | `codespell.yml` | Codespell | `pull_request` ŌåÆ `main`, `release-*` | *(none ŌĆö scans tree after temporarily removing some manifests)* | `codespell` | Backup/remove `pyproject.toml`, `package.json`, `package-lock.json`; `pip install codespell`; `codespell` with `--check-filenames`, `--skip`, `--ignore-words-list`; restore files | ŌĆö | ŌĆö |
18: | `build-push-release.yml` | Build and Push Release Images | `push` ŌåÆ `main`; `push` tags `v*.*.*`, `v*.*.*-*` | *(none)* | `build-and-push` | Checkout; Go 1.24.4; Buildx; `docker/login-action` to `ghcr.io`; set `TAG` from ref; `make docker-buildx-push` (workload manager), `docker-buildx-push-router`, `docker-buildx-push-picod` with `IMAGE_REGISTRY` | `TAG`, `IMAGE_REGISTRY=ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}` | `GITHUB_TOKEN` (registry login) |
19: | `dify-plugin-publish.yml` | Dify Plugin Publish | `push` tags `dify-plugin/v*` | *(none)* | `publish` | Download `dify-plugin` CLI 0.0.6; install `yq`; read `manifest.yaml`; package plugin; checkout `author/dify-plugins` with token; move `.difypkg`; branch, commit, push; `gh pr create` to `langgenius/dify-plugins` | `GH_TOKEN` on PR step | `PLUGIN_ACTION` (repo checkout + `gh`; cross-repo PR) |
20: | `workflows-approve.yml` | Approve Workflows | `pull_request_target` types `labeled`, `synchronize` ŌåÆ `main`, `release-**` | *(logic: first-time contributor vs `ok-to-test` label)* | `approve` | `github-script`: list contributor PRs; if not first-time or has `ok-to-test`, list `action_required` workflow runs for SHA and approve | ŌĆö | `GITHUB_TOKEN` |
21: 
22: ### Workflow notes
23: 
24: - **`e2e.yml`**: Uses Kind action with `install_only: true` so the cluster is created by `run_e2e.sh` (`kind create cluster`), avoiding double-creation.
25: - **`test-coverage.yml`**: `workflow_call` declares `CODECOV_TOKEN` optional for reusable invocation; PR runs use the repo secret when configured.
26: - **`build-push-release.yml`**: Uses older action major versions (`checkout@v3`, `setup-go@v4`, `buildx@v2`) than most other workflows.
27: 
28: ---
29: 
30: ## E2E test setup (`test/e2e/run_e2e.sh`)
31: 
32: ### Kind cluster
33: 
34: | Item | Value / behavior |
35: |------|------------------|
36: | Default cluster name | `E2E_CLUSTER_NAME` ŌåÆ `agentcube-e2e` |
37: | Creation | `kind create cluster --name "${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME}"` if missing; if exists and `E2E_CLEAN_CLUSTER=true` (default), delete then recreate |
38: | CI alignment | `.github/workflows/e2e.yml` installs Kind **v0.30.0** via `helm/kind-action@v1` (`install_only: true`) |
39: | Skip setup | `E2E_SKIP_SETUP=true` skips `run_setup` and assumes an existing cluster |
40: 
41: ### CRD / agent-sandbox installation
42: 
43: Applied via `kubectl apply --validate=false` after downloading release assets (URLs built from `AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION`, default **`v0.1.1`**):
44: 
45: 1. `https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox/releases/download/${AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION}/manifest.yaml`
46: 2. `https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox/releases/download/${AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION}/extensions.yaml`
47: 
48: ### Images pre-pulled and loaded into Kind
49: 
50: - `registry.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/agent-sandbox-controller:${AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION}`
51: - `python:3.9-slim` (echo agent workload)
52: 
53: Local images built and loaded:
54: 
55: - `make docker-build` ŌåÆ default `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE` **`workloadmanager:latest`**
56: - `make docker-build-router` ŌåÆ **`agentcube-router:latest`**
57: - `make docker-build-picod` ŌåÆ **`picod:latest`**
58: - `REDIS_IMAGE` default **`redis:7-alpine`** (Deployment + Service in namespace)
59: 
60: ### Helm (AgentCube chart)
61: 
62: | Item | Value |
63: |------|--------|
64: | Chart path | `manifests/charts/base` |
65: | Release / namespace | `agentcube` in `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` (default `agentcube`), `--create-namespace` |
66: | Redis addr | `redis.${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}.svc.cluster.local:6379`, password empty |
67: | Workload manager image | `repository=workloadmanager`, `tag=latest` |
68: | Router image | `repository=agentcube-router`, `tag=latest` |
69: | Router RBAC | `router.rbac.create=true`, `router.serviceAccountName=agentcube-router` |
70: | Extra env (JSON via `--set-json`) | Workload manager: `REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false`, `JWT_KEY_SECRET_NAMESPACE=agentcube`; Router: `REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false` |
71: | Wait | `helm upgrade --install ... --wait` |
72: 
73: ### Kubernetes fixtures applied during setup
74: 
75: | Path | Purpose |
76: |------|---------|
77: | `test/e2e/echo_agent.yaml` | `AgentRuntime` `echo-agent` in `agentcube` |
78: | Generated from `echo_agent.yaml` (sed) | `echo-agent-short-ttl` with `sessionTimeout: "30s"` for TTL tests |
79: | `test/e2e/e2e_code_interpreter.yaml` | `CodeInterpreter` `e2e-code-interpreter` in `agentcube` |
80: 
81: Warm-pool Go tests apply `e2e_code_interpreter_warmpool.yaml` at runtime (not in initial `kubectl apply` list in the shell script).
82: 
83: ### Port forwards and health checks
84: 
85: - Workload manager: `kubectl port-forward svc/workloadmanager` ŌåÆ `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_LOCAL_PORT` (default **8080**) ŌåÆ pod 8080
86: - Router: `kubectl port-forward svc/agentcube-router` ŌåÆ `ROUTER_LOCAL_PORT` (default **8081**) ŌåÆ pod 8080
87: - Readiness: `curl` to `http://localhost:${WORKLOAD_MANAGER_LOCAL_PORT}/health` and `http://localhost:${ROUTER_LOCAL_PORT}/health/live`
88: 
89: ### Auth for tests
90: 
91: - ServiceAccount `e2e-test` in `agentcube` + `ClusterRoleBinding` to `workloadmanager` clusterrole
92: - API token: `kubectl create token e2e-test -n agentcube --duration=24h` ŌåÆ `API_TOKEN`
93: 
94: ### Python venv for E2E
95: 
96: - Directory: `E2E_VENV_DIR` (default `/tmp/agentcube-e2e-venv`)
97: - `python3 -m venv`, `pip install -e ./sdk-python`, verify `import agentcube`
98: 
99: ### Test commands invoked by `run_e2e.sh`
100: 
101: **Go** (from repository root):
102: 
103: ```bash
104: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL="http://localhost:${WORKLOAD_MANAGER_LOCAL_PORT}" \
105: ROUTER_URL="http://localhost:${ROUTER_LOCAL_PORT}" \
106: API_TOKEN=$API_TOKEN \
107: go test -v ./test/e2e/...
108: ```
109: 
110: **Python** (after `cd` to `test/e2e`):
111: 
112: ```bash
113: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL="..." ROUTER_URL="..." API_TOKEN=$API_TOKEN \
114: AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE="${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" \
115: "$E2E_VENV_DIR/bin/python" test_codeinterpreter.py
116: ```
117: 
118: (`test_codeinterpreter.py` uses `unittest.main()` and appends `--verbose` if missing.)
119: 
120: ### Failure artifacts
121: 
122: On test failure, `collect_component_logs` writes under `ARTIFACTS_PATH` (CI: `${{ github.workspace }}/e2e-logs`): workload manager, router, and sandbox pod logs/describes.
123: 
124: ---
125: 
126: ## Test directory structure
127: 
128: ```
129: test/
130: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ OWNERS
131: ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ e2e/
132:     Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ README.md
133:     Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ __init__.py
134:     Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ run_e2e.sh
135:     Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ e2e_test.go
136:     Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ test_codeinterpreter.py
137:     Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ echo_agent.yaml
138:     Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ e2e_code_interpreter.yaml
139:     ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ e2e_code_interpreter_warmpool.yaml
140: ```
141: 
142: ### Fixture paths (relative to repo root unless noted)
143: 
144: | Fixture | Description |
145: |---------|-------------|
146: | `test/e2e/echo_agent.yaml` | Echo `AgentRuntime` for router invocation tests |
147: | `test/e2e/e2e_code_interpreter.yaml` | Standard `CodeInterpreter` (`e2e-code-interpreter`, namespace `agentcube`) |
148: | `test/e2e/e2e_code_interpreter_warmpool.yaml` | `CodeInterpreter` with `warmPoolSize: 2` in `default` (loaded by Go tests from **package cwd** as `e2e_code_interpreter_warmpool.yaml`) |
149: 
150: ---
151: 
152: ## Go test commands and flags in CI
153: 
154: | Workflow / entrypoint | Command | Flags / notes |
155: |------------------------|---------|----------------|
156: | `test-coverage.yml` | `go test` | `-race -v -coverprofile=coverage.out -coverpkg=./pkg/... ./pkg/...` |
157: | `e2e.yml` via `make e2e` ŌåÆ `run_e2e.sh` | `go test` | `-v ./test/e2e/...` with env `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL`, `ROUTER_URL`, `API_TOKEN` |
158: 
159: ---
160: 
161: ## Python test commands in CI
162: 
163: | Workflow | Working dir | Command |
164: |----------|-------------|---------|
165: | `python-sdk-tests.yml` | `sdk-python` | `python -m pip install --upgrade pip`; `pip install pytest`; `pip install -e .`; `python -m pytest tests/ -v` |
166: | `e2e.yml` (via `run_e2e.sh`) | Invoked from `test/e2e/` | `"$E2E_VENV_DIR/bin/python" test_codeinterpreter.py` (unittest, verbosity 2) |
167: 
168: ---
169: 
170: ## Key Make targets referenced by CI
171: 
172: | Target | Referenced in | Role |
173: |--------|----------------|------|
174: | `docker-build` | `main.yml`, `run_e2e.sh` | Build workload manager image |
175: | `docker-build-router` | `run_e2e.sh` | Build router image |
176: | `docker-build-picod` | `run_e2e.sh` | Build picod image |
177: | `docker-buildx-push` | `build-push-release.yml` | Push workload manager image (`IMAGE_REGISTRY`, `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE=workloadmanager:${TAG}`) |
178: | `docker-buildx-push-router` | `build-push-release.yml` | Push router image |
179: | `docker-buildx-push-picod` | `build-push-release.yml` | Push picod image |
180: | `e2e` | `e2e.yml` | Run `./test/e2e/run_e2e.sh` |
181: | `e2e-clean` | `e2e.yml` | `kind delete cluster --name $(E2E_CLUSTER_NAME)`; `rm -rf /tmp/agent-sandbox` |
182: | `lint` | `lint.yml` | `golangci-lint` (project default) |
183: | `gen-check` | `codegen-check.yml` | Verify generated code up to date |
184: | `gen-copyright` | `copyright-check.yml` | Generate copyright headers for check |
185: 
186: ---
187: 
188: ## Additional reference: E2E README vs script
189: 
190: `test/e2e/README.md` states Go **1.24+** and generic ŌĆ£install CRDs and agent-sandboxŌĆØ; the **CI workflow** pins Go **1.23** for E2E, and **run_e2e.sh** pins **agent-sandbox `v0.1.1`** by default (overridable via `AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION`).

(End of file - total 190 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>1: # AgentCube Integrations ŌĆö Design
2: 
3: Sources: `/tmp/agentcube-ref/integrations/dify-plugin/`, `/tmp/agentcube-ref/example/pcap-analyzer/`.
4: 
5: ## Dify plugin ŌĆö file map
6: 
7: | File | Role |
8: |------|------|
9: | `main.py` | `Plugin(DifyPluginEnv(MAX_REQUEST_TIMEOUT=120)).run()` |
10: | `manifest.yaml` | Root plugin manifest for Dify |
11: | `provider/agentcube.yaml` | Tool provider identity + tool list + Python entry |
12: | `provider/agentcube.py` | `AgentcubeCodeInterpreterProvider` |
13: | `tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.yaml` | Tool parameter schema |
14: | `tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.py` | `AgentcubeCodeInterpreterTool` |
15: | `requirements.txt` | `dify-plugin` + `agentcube-sdk` pins |
16: | `GUIDE.md`, `README.md`, `PRIVACY.md`, `.difyignore` | Docs / packaging |
17: 
18: ## `manifest.yaml` structure (exact top-level keys)
19: 
20: From source:
21: 
22: - `version`: `0.0.2`
23: - `type`: `plugin`
24: - `author`: `volcano-sh`
25: - `name`: `agentcube`
26: - `label`: map `en_US`, `ja_JP`, `zh_Hans`, `pt_BR` ŌåÆ `Agentcube`
27: - `description`: multilingual strings (AgentCube description)
28: - `icon`: `icon.png`
29: - `icon_dark`: `icon-dark.png`
30: - `resource`: `memory`, `permission` subtree (`tool`, `model`, `endpoint`, `app`, `storage` flags and sizes)
31: - `plugins.tools`: list `[provider/agentcube.yaml]`
32: - `meta`: `version`, `arch` (`amd64`, `arm64`), `runner` (`language: python`, `version: "3.12"`, `entrypoint: main`), `minimum_dify_version: null`
33: - `created_at`, `privacy`, `repo`, `verified`
34: 
35: ## `provider/agentcube.yaml` structure
36: 
37: - `identity`: `author`, `name`, `label` (multilingual), `description` (multilingual), `icon`
38: - Commented `oauth_schema` block (not active)
39: - `tools`: list `[tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.yaml]`
40: - `extra.python.source`: `provider/agentcube.py`
41: 
42: ## Tool definition (`tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.yaml`)
43: 
44: - `identity.name`: `agentcube-code-interpreter`
45: - `identity.author`: `agentcube`
46: - `identity.label` / `description` (human + llm strings)
47: - `parameters` (each has `name`, `type`, `required`, `label`, `human_description`, `llm_description`, `form`):
48: 
49: | name | type | required | form | notes |
50: |------|------|----------|------|-------|
51: | `router_url` | string | true | form | |
52: | `workload_manager_url` | string | true | form | |
53: | `language` | select | false | llm | options: `python`, `javascript`, `typescript` |
54: | `code` | string | false | llm | |
55: | `command` | string | false | llm | |
56: | `session_id` | string | false | llm | |
57: | `session_reuse` | boolean | false | llm | |
58: | `code_interpreter_id` | string | false | llm | |
59: 
60: - `extra.python.source`: `tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.py`
61: 
62: ## Provider implementation (`provider/agentcube.py`)
63: 
64: ```python
65: from dify_plugin import ToolProvider
66: from dify_plugin.errors.tool import ToolProviderCredentialValidationError
67: 
68: class AgentcubeCodeInterpreterProvider(ToolProvider):
69:     def _validate_credentials(self, credentials: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
70:         try:
71:             """ IMPLEMENT YOUR VALIDATION HERE """
72:         except Exception as e:
73:             raise ToolProviderCredentialValidationError(str(e))
74: ```
75: 
76: (OAuth helper methods are present only as comments.)
77: 
78: ## Tool implementation (`tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.py`)
79: 
80: ```python
81: from collections.abc import Generator
82: from typing import Any
83: from dify_plugin import Tool
84: from dify_plugin.entities.tool import ToolInvokeMessage
85: from agentcube import CodeInterpreterClient
86: 
87: class AgentcubeCodeInterpreterTool(Tool):
88:     def _invoke(self, tool_parameters: dict[str, Any]) -> Generator[ToolInvokeMessage]:
89:         result = self.execute(**tool_parameters)
90:         yield self.create_json_message(result)
91: 
92:     def execute(
93:         self,
94:         router_url=None,
95:         workload_manager_url=None,
96:         language="python",
97:         code_interpreter_id=None,
98:         session_id=None,
99:         code=None,
100:         command=None,
101:         session_reuse=False,
102:         **kwargs
103:     ): ...
104: ```
105: 
106: ## Plugin dependencies (`integrations/dify-plugin/requirements.txt`)
107: 
108: ```
109: dify-plugin>=0.4.2,<0.5.0
110: agentcube-sdk>=0.0.10
111: ```
112: 
113: ## PCAP analyzer ŌĆö application structure (`example/pcap-analyzer/`)
114: 
115: | File | Role |
116: |------|------|
117: | `pcap_analyzer.py` | FastAPI app, agents, sandbox runner, analysis orchestration, `uvicorn` entry |
118: | `requirements.txt` | FastAPI, uvicorn, LangChain / LangGraph stack, multipart, etc. |
119: | `Dockerfile` | `uv` base image, installs reqs, copies `sdk-python/agentcube` + `pcap_analyzer.py` |
120: | `deployment.yaml` | K8s Deployment + env for OpenAI-compatible API and AgentCube URLs |
121: | `README.md` | Documentation |
122: 
123: ## FastAPI application (`pcap_analyzer.py`)
124: 
125: ### Globals / config (selected)
126: 
127: | Name | Source | Default / value |
128: |------|--------|-----------------|
129: | `API_KEY` | `OPENAI_API_KEY` | required at startup |
130: | `API_BASE_URL` | `OPENAI_API_BASE` | `https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1` |
131: | `MODEL_NAME` | `OPENAI_MODEL` | `Qwen/QwQ-32B` |
132: | `CODEINTERPRETER_NAME` | env | `my-interpreter` |
133: | `SANDBOX_NAMESPACE` | env | `default` |
134: | `SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC` | env | `5` |
135: | `SERVER_HOST` | constant | `0.0.0.0` |
136: | `SERVER_PORT` | constant | `8000` |
137: | `SERVER_RELOAD` | constant | `True` |
138: 
139: ### Core classes / functions
140: 
141: ```python
142: class SandboxRunner:
143:     def __init__(self, name: str = "my-interpreter", namespace: str = "default", warmup_sec: int = 5): ...
144:     def upload_file(self, local_path: str, remote_path: str) -> bool: ...
145:     def upload_bytes(self, data: bytes, remote_path: str) -> bool: ...
146:     def run(self, command: str) -> Dict[str, Any]: ...
147:     def stop(self): ...
148: 
149: def build_react_agent(llm, system_prompt: str): ...
150: def invoke_react_agent(agent, user_text: str) -> str: ...
151: def build_planner_agent(llm): ...
152: def build_reporter_agent(llm): ...
153: 
154: def _plan_script(agent, pcap_local_path: str) -> str: ...
155: def _repair_script(agent, prev_script: str, results: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> str: ...
156: def _execute_once_in_runner(runner: SandboxRunner, pcap_local_path: str, script: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]: ...
157: def _analyze_with_retries(..., max_retries: int = 2) -> Dict[str, Any]: ...
158: def _report(agent, results: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> str: ...
159: 
160: class AnalyzeResponse(BaseModel):
161:     script: str
162:     results: List[Dict[str, Any]]
163:     report: str
164: 
165: app = FastAPI(title="PCAP Analyzer ŌĆö Env-Only Config")
166: ```
167: 
168: ### FastAPI endpoints
169: 
170: | Method | Path | Signature / behavior |
171: |--------|------|----------------------|
172: | (event) | startup | `on_startup()` ŌåÆ builds `ChatOpenAI`, `PLANNER`, `REPORTER`; fails if no API key |
173: | `POST` | `/analyze` | `async def analyze_endpoint(pcap_file: UploadFile = File(None), pcap_path: str = Form(None))` ŌåÆ `response_model=AnalyzeResponse` |
174: 
175: ### Imports of note
176: 
177: ```python
178: from fastapi import FastAPI, UploadFile, File, Form, HTTPException
179: from pydantic import BaseModel
180: import uvicorn
181: from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
182: from langgraph.prebuilt import create_react_agent
183: from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, AIMessage
184: from agentcube.code_interpreter import CodeInterpreterClient
185: from agentcube.exceptions import CommandExecutionError
186: ```
187: 
188: ## Kubernetes deployment (`deployment.yaml`)
189: 
190: - `Deployment` `pcap-analyzer` in `namespace: default`
191: - Container `pcap-analyzer`, image `pcap-analyzer:latest`, `imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent`
192: - Container port `8000` TCP
193: - Resources: requests `cpu: 200m`, `memory: 100Mi`; limits `cpu: 1`, `memory: 1Gi`
194: - Env: `OPENAI_API_KEY` from secret `pcap-analyzer-secrets` key `openai-api-key`; `OPENAI_API_BASE`, `OPENAI_MODEL`, `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL`, `ROUTER_URL`, `CODEINTERPRETER_NAME`, `SANDBOX_NAMESPACE`, `SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC`
195: - Command: `["uv"]`, args: `["run", "pcap_analyzer.py"]`
196: 
197: ## Dockerfile highlights
198: 
199: - Base: `ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:python3.12-bookworm-slim`
200: - `uv venv` + `uv pip install -r requirements.txt`
201: - Copies `sdk-python/agentcube` ŌåÆ `./agentcube/`, `pcap_analyzer.py` ŌåÆ `./`
202: - `ENV PYTHONPATH="/app"`, exposes `8000`
203: - `CMD ["uv", "run", "pcap_analyzer.py"]`
204: 
205: ## PCAP example Python dependencies (`example/pcap-analyzer/requirements.txt`)
206: 
207: Pinned packages include: `fastapi==0.120.0`, `uvicorn==0.38.0`, `langchain==1.0.2`, `langchain-classic==1.0.0`, `langchain-community==0.4.1`, `langchain-core==1.0.1`, `langchain-openai==1.0.1`, `langchain-text-splitters==1.0.0`, `langgraph==1.0.1`, `langgraph-checkpoint==3.0.0`, `langgraph-prebuilt==1.0.1`, `langgraph-sdk==0.2.9`, `langsmith==0.4.38`, `paramiko==4.0.0`, `python-multipart==0.0.20`
208: 
209: *(The Dockerfile vendors `agentcube` from the monorepo copy; it is not listed in this `requirements.txt`.)*

(End of file - total 209 lines)
</content>

input.content:
# AgentCube Implementation Plan

## Overview

AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents. This plan covers the implementation of Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033.

## Module Mapping

| AR Number | Spec Module | Description |
|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| AR-023 | CI/CD | Pull request build verification |
| AR-024 | CI/CD | Go lint on changed Go code |
| AR-025 | CI/CD | Code generation check |
| AR-026 | CI/CD | Go test coverage reporting |
| AR-027 | CI/CD | E2E testing on Kind |
| AR-028 | CI/CD | Python SDK unit tests |
| AR-029 | CI/CD | Python lint |
| AR-030 | CI/CD | Spelling check (codespell) |
| AR-031 | CI/CD | Copyright header check |
| AR-032 | CI/CD | Release image publication |
| AR-033 | CI/CD | Workflow approval for first-time contributors |

---

## AR-023: CI/CD - Pull Request Build Verification

### Description
Build the Workload Manager Docker image on pull requests targeting `main` or `release-*` branches.

### Files to Create
1. `.github/workflows/main.yml`

### Test Files
- `.github/workflows/main.yml` (workflow validation via `actionlint` or manual)

### Dependencies
- Docker Buildx
- Go 1.24+
- `make docker-build`

---

## AR-024: CI/CD - Go Lint on Changed Go Code

### Description
Run `make lint` (golangci-lint) when Go-related paths change on pull requests to `main` or `release-*`.

### Files to Create
1. `.github/workflows/lint.yml`
2. `.golangci.yml`

### Test Files
- `.golangci.yml` validation

### Dependencies
- golangci-lint v1.64.1
- Go 1.24

---

## AR-025: CI/CD - Code Generation Check

### Description
Verify generated artifacts match `make gen-all` when API, hack, workflow, or Makefile inputs change.

### Files to Create
1. `.github/workflows/codegen-check.yml`

### Test Files
- None (CI workflow validation)

### Dependencies
- Go 1.24.4
- controller-gen v0.17.2
- `make gen-check`

---

## AR-026: CI/CD - Go Test Coverage Reporting

### Description
Run race-enabled coverage tests on `pkg/...` for qualifying pull requests and merge groups.

### Files to Create
1. `.github/workflows/test-coverage.yml`

### Test Files
- `pkg/**/*_test.go` (unit tests for all packages)

### Dependencies
- Go 1.24
- Codecov (optional)

---

## AR-027: CI/CD - E2E Testing on Kind

### Description
Run `make e2e` in CI using a Kind-capable Ubuntu runner, capturing logs on failure.

### Files to Create
1. `.github/workflows/e2e.yml`
2. `test/e2e/run_e2e.sh`
3. `test/e2e/__init__.py`
4. `test/e2e/e2e_test.go`
5. `test/e2e/test_codeinterpreter.py`

### Test Files
- `test/e2e/e2e_test.go`
- `test/e2e/test_codeinterpreter.py`

### Dependencies
- Kind v0.30.0
- Go 1.23
- Helm
- kubectl

---

## AR-028: CI/CD - Python SDK Unit Tests

### Description
Run pytest for the SDK when `sdk-python/**` changes.

### Files to Create
1. `.github/workflows/python-sdk-tests.yml`
2. `sdk-python/tests/__init__.py`
3. `sdk-python/tests/test_control_plane.py`
4. `sdk-python/tests/test_code_interpreter.py`
5. `sdk-python/tests/test_agent_runtime.py`

### Test Files
- `sdk-python/tests/test_control_plane.py`
- `sdk-python/tests/test_code_interpreter.py`
- `sdk-python/tests/test_agent_runtime.py`

### Dependencies
- Python 3.12
- pytest
- `sdk-python/pyproject.toml`

---

## AR-029: CI/CD - Python Lint

### Description

## Implementation Order

1. **Phase 1**: CI/CD workflows (AR-023 to AR-033)
   - `.github/workflows/` files
   - `hack/` scripts
   - `test/e2e/` test files

2. **Phase 2**: Core Go packages
   - `pkg/apis/` - CRD definitions
   - `pkg/common/types/` - Shared types
   - `pkg/api/` - Error definitions
   - `pkg/store/` - Redis/Valkey store

3. **Phase 3**: Server implementations
   - `pkg/workloadmanager/`
   - `pkg/router/`
   - `pkg/agentd/`
   - `pkg/picod/`

4. **Phase 4**: Python SDK
   - `sdk-python/agentcube/`
   - `sdk-python/tests/`

5. **Phase 5**: CLI toolkit
   - `cmd/cli/agentcube/`

6. **Phase 6**: Helm charts & Dockerfiles
   - `manifests/charts/base/`
   - `docker/`

7. **Phase 7**: Integrations
   - `integrations/dify-plugin/`
   - `example/pcap-analyzer/`

8. **Phase 8**: Makefile & build system
   - `Makefile`
   - `go.mod` / `go.sum`

212:

218: | `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |

220: | `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
221: | `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
222: | `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
223: | `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
224: | `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |
225: 
226: ### Interface
227: 
228: ```go
229: type Store interface {
230:     Ping(ctx context.Context) error
231:     GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
232:     StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
233:     UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
234:     DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
235:     ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
236:     ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
237:     UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
238:     Close() error
239: }
240: ```
241:

metadata.preview:
# AgentCube ŌĆö Implementation Plan (AR-001 through AR-011)

## Overview

This plan covers all 11 Architectural Requirements for the AgentCube project (Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform).

## Mapping AR ŌåÆ Specs

| AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
|----|---------------|-----------------|
| AR-001 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey session persistence |
| AR-002 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRDs, workload manager, GC |
| AR-003 | `session-routing/` | HTTP router, JWT, reverse proxy |
| AR-004 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd controller for idle sandbox cleanup |
| AR-005 | `code-execution/` | PicoD HTTP daemon for code execution |
| AR-006 | `ci-cd/` | GitHub Actions workflows, E2E scripts |
| AR-007 | `python-sdk/` | Python SDK (agentcube-sdk) |
| AR-008 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI tool (kubectl-agentcube) |
| AR-009 | `deployment/` | Helm chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile |
| AR-010 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer |

part.text: The existing PLAN.md covers AR-001 through AR-011. I'll update it to add the CI/CD requirements (AR-023 through AR-033):

input.oldString:
## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-006** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)
input.newString:
---

## AR-023: CI/CD - Pull Request Build Verification

### Description
Build the Workload Manager Docker image on pull requests targeting `main` or `release-*` branches.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/main.yml` | Agentcube CI Workflow (Docker build on PR) |

### Test Files
- Workflow validation via `actionlint` (optional)

### Dependencies
- Docker Buildx
- Go 1.24+
- `make docker-build`

---

## AR-024: CI/CD - Go Lint on Changed Go Code

### Description
Run `make lint` (golangci-lint) when Go-related paths change on pull requests to `main` or `release-*`.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/lint.yml` | Go lint workflow |
| `.golangci.yml` | golangci-lint configuration |

### Test Files
- None (lint validation)

### Dependencies
- golangci-lint v1.64.1
- Go 1.24

---

## AR-025: CI/CD - Code Generation Check

### Description
Verify generated artifacts match `make gen-all` when API, hack, workflow, or Makefile inputs change.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/codegen-check.yml` | Code generation drift check workflow |

### Test Files
- None

### Dependencies
- Go 1.24.4
- controller-gen v0.17.2
- `make gen-check`

---

## AR-026: CI/CD - Go Test Coverage Reporting

### Description
Run race-enabled coverage tests on `pkg/...` for qualifying pull requests and merge groups.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/test-coverage.yml` | Test coverage workflow |

### Test Files
| Test File | Package |
|-----------|---------|
| `pkg/store/*_test.go` | store |
| `pkg/router/*_test.go` | router |
| `pkg/workloadmanager/*_test.go` | workloadmanager |
| `pkg/agentd/*_test.go` | agentd |
| `pkg/picod/*_test.go` | picod |

### Dependencies
- Go 1.24
- Codecov (optional)

---

## AR-027: CI/CD - E2E Testing on Kind

### Description
Run `make e2e` in CI using a Kind-capable Ubuntu runner, capturing logs on failure.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/e2e.yml` | E2E tests workflow |
| `test/e2e/run_e2e.sh` | E2E test runner script |
| `test/e2e/__init__.py` | Test package marker |
| `test/e2e/e2e_test.go` | Go E2E tests |
| `test/e2e/test_codeinterpreter.py` | Python E2E tests |
| `test/e2e/echo_agent.yaml` | Echo AgentRuntime fixture |
| `test/e2e/e2e_code_interpreter.yaml` | CodeInterpreter fixture |
| `test/e2e/e2e_code_interpreter_warmpool.yaml` | Warm pool fixture |
| `test/OWNERS` | OWNERS file |

### Test Files
| Test File | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `test/e2e/e2e_test.go` | Go E2E tests |
| `test/e2e/test_codeinterpreter.py` | Python E2E tests |

### Dependencies
- Kind v0.30.0
- Go 1.23
- Helm
- kubectl
- Docker

---

## AR-028: CI/CD - Python SDK Unit Tests

### Description
Run pytest for the SDK when `sdk-python/**` changes.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/python-sdk-tests.yml` | Python SDK pytest workflow |

### Test Files
| Test File | Module |
|-----------|--------|
| `sdk-python/tests/__init__.py` | Test package marker |
| `sdk-python/tests/test_code_interpreter.py` | CodeInterpreter client tests |
| `sdk-python/tests/test_agent_runtime.py` | AgentRuntime client tests |
| `sdk-python/tests/test_control_plane.py` | ControlPlane client tests |
| `sdk-python/tests/test_data_plane.py` | DataPlane client tests |
| `sdk-python/tests/conftest.py` | Pytest fixtures |

### Dependencies
- Python 3.12
- pytest
- `sdk-python/pyproject.toml`

---

## AR-029: CI/CD - Python Lint

### Description
Run Ruff from repository root using `pyproject.toml` when Python-touching paths change.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/python-lint.yml` | Python Ruff lint workflow |

### Test Files
- None (lint validation)

### Dependencies
- Python 3.10
- ruff

---

## AR-030: CI/CD - Spelling Check (codespell)

### Description
Run codespell on the repository for pull requests to `main` or `release-*`.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/codespell.yml` | Spelling check workflow |

### Test Files
- None

### Dependencies
- codespell

---

## AR-031: CI/CD - Copyright Header Check

### Description
Ensure `make gen-copyright` produces no git diff when applicable files change.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/copyright-check.yml` | Copyright header check workflow |
| `hack/boilerplate.go.txt` | Go boilerplate template |
| `hack/boilerplate.py.txt` | Python boilerplate template |
| `hack/update-copyright.sh` | Copyright header injector script |

### Test Files
- None

### Dependencies
- moreutils (sponge)
- `make gen-copyright`

---

## AR-032: CI/CD - Release Image Publication

### Description
Build and push multi-architecture images for workloadmanager, router, and picod to GitHub Container Registry on pushes to `main` and on semantic version tags.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/build-push-release.yml` | Release image build & push workflow |

### Test Files
- None

### Dependencies
- Docker Buildx
- Go 1.24.4
- `make docker-buildx-push*`

---

## AR-033: CI/CD - Workflow Approval for First-Time Contributors

### Description
Optionally approve pending workflow runs for pull requests from repeat contributors or those labeled `ok-to-test`.

### Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/workflows-approve.yml` | Workflow approval workflow |

### Test Files
- None

### Dependencies
- GitHub CLI (gh)
- `GITHUB_TOKEN` secret

---

## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-023 to AR-033** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel with AR-009
    - AR-023: main.yml
    - AR-024: lint.yml + .golangci.yml
    - AR-025: codegen-check.yml
    - AR-026: test-coverage.yml
    - AR-027: e2e.yml + test/e2e/*
    - AR-028: python-sdk-tests.yml
    - AR-029: python-lint.yml
    - AR-030: codespell.yml
    - AR-031: copyright-check.yml + hack/*
    - AR-032: build-push-release.yml
    - AR-033: workflows-approve.yml
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)

# AgentCube ŌĆö Implementation Plan (AR-001 through AR-011)

## Overview

This plan covers all 11 Architectural Requirements for the AgentCube project (Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform).

## Mapping AR ŌåÆ Specs

| AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
|----|---------------|-----------------|
| AR-001 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey session persistence |
| AR-002 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRDs, workload manager, GC |
| AR-003 | `session-routing/` | HTTP router, JWT, reverse proxy |
| AR-004 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd controller for idle sandbox cleanup |
| AR-005 | `code-execution/` | PicoD HTTP daemon for code execution |
| AR-006 | `ci-cd/` | GitHub Actions workflows, E2E scripts |
| AR-007 | `python-sdk/` | Python SDK (agentcube-sdk) |
| AR-008 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI tool (kubectl-agentcube) |
| AR-009 | `deployment/` | Helm chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile |
| AR-010 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer |
| AR-011 | `deployment/client-go.md` | Generated Kubernetes client library |

## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
| `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
| `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |

### Interface

```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

### Dependencies
- `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9`
- `github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go`
- `k8s.io/klog/v2`
- `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-006** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)

# AgentCube ŌĆö Implementation Plan (AR-001 through AR-011)

## Overview

This plan covers all 11 Architectural Requirements for the AgentCube project (Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform).

## Mapping AR ŌåÆ Specs

| AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
|----|---------------|-----------------|
| AR-001 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey session persistence |
| AR-002 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRDs, workload manager, GC |
| AR-003 | `session-routing/` | HTTP router, JWT, reverse proxy |
| AR-004 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd controller for idle sandbox cleanup |
| AR-005 | `code-execution/` | PicoD HTTP daemon for code execution |
| AR-006 | `ci-cd/` | GitHub Actions workflows, E2E scripts |
| AR-007 | `python-sdk/` | Python SDK (agentcube-sdk) |
| AR-008 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI tool (kubectl-agentcube) |
| AR-009 | `deployment/` | Helm chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile |
| AR-010 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer |
| AR-011 | `deployment/client-go.md` | Generated Kubernetes client library |

---

## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
| `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
| `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |

### Interface

```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

### Dependencies
- `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9`
- `github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go`
- `k8s.io/klog/v2`
- `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-023 to AR-033** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel with AR-009
    - AR-023: main.yml
    - AR-024: lint.yml + .golangci.yml
    - AR-025: codegen-check.yml
    - AR-026: test-coverage.yml
    - AR-027: e2e.yml + test/e2e/*
    - AR-028: python-sdk-tests.yml
    - AR-029: python-lint.yml
    - AR-030: codespell.yml
    - AR-031: copyright-check.yml + hack/*
    - AR-032: build-push-release.yml
    - AR-033: workflows-approve.yml
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)

# AgentCube ŌĆö Implementation Plan (AR-001 through AR-011)

## Overview

This plan covers all 11 Architectural Requirements for the AgentCube project (Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform).

## Mapping AR ŌåÆ Specs

| AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
|----|---------------|-----------------|
| AR-001 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey session persistence |
| AR-002 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRDs, workload manager, GC |
| AR-003 | `session-routing/` | HTTP router, JWT, reverse proxy |
| AR-004 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd controller for idle sandbox cleanup |
| AR-005 | `code-execution/` | PicoD HTTP daemon for code execution |
| AR-006 | `ci-cd/` | GitHub Actions workflows, E2E scripts |
| AR-007 | `python-sdk/` | Python SDK (agentcube-sdk) |
| AR-008 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI tool (kubectl-agentcube) |
| AR-009 | `deployment/` | Helm chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile |
| AR-010 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer |
| AR-011 | `deployment/client-go.md` | Generated Kubernetes client library |

---

## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
| `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
| `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |

### Interface

```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

### Dependencies
- `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9`
- `github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go`
- `k8s.io/klog/v2`
- `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-023 to AR-033** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel with AR-009
    - AR-023: main.yml
    - AR-024: lint.yml + .golangci.yml
    - AR-025: codegen-check.yml
    - AR-026: test-coverage.yml
    - AR-027: e2e.yml + test/e2e/*
    - AR-028: python-sdk-tests.yml
    - AR-029: python-lint.yml
    - AR-030: codespell.yml
    - AR-031: copyright-check.yml + hack/*
    - AR-032: build-push-release.yml
    - AR-033: workflows-approve.yml
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)

## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
| `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
| `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |

### Interface

```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

### Dependencies
- `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9`
- `github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go`
- `k8s.io/klog/v2`
- `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-023 to AR-033** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel with AR-009
    - AR-023: main.yml
    - AR-024: lint.yml + .golangci.yml
    - AR-025: codegen-check.yml
    - AR-026: test-coverage.yml
    - AR-027: e2e.yml + test/e2e/*
    - AR-028: python-sdk-tests.yml
    - AR-029: python-lint.yml
    - AR-030: codespell.yml
    - AR-031: copyright-check.yml + hack/*
    - AR-032: build-push-release.yml
    - AR-033: workflows-approve.yml
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)

# AgentCube ŌĆö Implementation Plan (AR-001 through AR-033)

## Overview

This plan covers all 11 Architectural Requirements for the AgentCube project (Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform).

## Mapping AR ŌåÆ Specs

| AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
|----|---------------|-----------------|
| AR-001 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey session persistence |
| AR-002 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRDs, workload manager, GC |
| AR-003 | `session-routing/` | HTTP router, JWT, reverse proxy |
| AR-004 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd controller for idle sandbox cleanup |
| AR-005 | `code-execution/` | PicoD HTTP daemon for code execution |
| AR-006 | `ci-cd/` | GitHub Actions workflows, E2E scripts |
| AR-007 | `python-sdk/` | Python SDK (agentcube-sdk) |
| AR-008 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI tool (kubectl-agentcube) |
| AR-009 | `deployment/` | Helm chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile |
| AR-010 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer |
| AR-011 | `deployment/client-go.md` | Generated Kubernetes client library |

## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
| `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
| `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |

### Interface

```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

### Dependencies
- `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9`
- `github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go`
- `k8s.io/klog/v2`
- `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-023 to AR-033** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel with AR-009
    - AR-023: main.yml
    - AR-024: lint.yml + .golangci.yml
    - AR-025: codegen-check.yml
    - AR-026: test-coverage.yml
    - AR-027: e2e.yml + test/e2e/*
    - AR-028: python-sdk-tests.yml
    - AR-029: python-lint.yml
    - AR-030: codespell.yml
    - AR-031: copyright-check.yml + hack/*
    - AR-032: build-push-release.yml
    - AR-033: workflows-approve.yml
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)

## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
| `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
| `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |

### Interface

```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

### Dependencies
- `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9`
- `github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go`
- `k8s.io/klog/v2`
- `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
| `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
| `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |

### Interface

```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

### Dependencies
- `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9`
- `github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go`
- `k8s.io/klog/v2`
- `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-023 to AR-033** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel with AR-009
    - AR-023: main.yml
    - AR-024: lint.yml + .golangci.yml
    - AR-025: codegen-check.yml
    - AR-026: test-coverage.yml
    - AR-027: e2e.yml + test/e2e/*
    - AR-028: python-sdk-tests.yml
    - AR-029: python-lint.yml
    - AR-030: codespell.yml
    - AR-031: copyright-check.yml + hack/*
    - AR-032: build-push-release.yml
    - AR-033: workflows-approve.yml
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)

## AR-001: Session Store (`pkg/store/`)

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `pkg/store/store.go` | `Store` interface definition (all method signatures) |
| `pkg/store/errors.go` | `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
| `pkg/store/singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton with `sync.Once`, `initStore()` |
| `pkg/store/store_redis.go` | Redis implementation (go-redis/v9) |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey.go` | Valkey implementation (valkey-go) |
| `pkg/store/store_redis_test.go` | Redis provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_valkey_test.go` | Valkey provider tests |
| `pkg/store/store_test.go` | Interface/conformance tests |

### Interface

```go
type Store interface {
    Ping(ctx context.Context) error
    GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
    DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
    ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
    UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
    Close() error
}
```

### Dependencies
- `github.com/redis/go-redis/v9`
- `github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go`
- `k8s.io/klog/v2`
- `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types`

## Implementation Order

1. **AR-002a** (CRD types) ŌĆö foundational for everything else
2. **AR-001** (session store) ŌĆö dependency of AR-002/003
3. **AR-002b/002c** (common types, API errors)
4. **AR-002d** (workload manager core) ŌĆö depends on AR-001, AR-002a
5. **AR-002e** (workload manager binary)
6. **AR-003** (router) ŌĆö depends on AR-001
7. **AR-004** (idle cleanup agentd)
8. **AR-005** (PicoD)
9. **AR-009** (Dockerfiles, Helm, Makefile) ŌĆö can be parallel
10. **AR-023 to AR-033** (CI/CD workflows) ŌĆö can be parallel with AR-009
    - AR-023: main.yml
    - AR-024: lint.yml + .golangci.yml
    - AR-025: codegen-check.yml
    - AR-026: test-coverage.yml
    - AR-027: e2e.yml + test/e2e/*
    - AR-028: python-sdk-tests.yml
    - AR-029: python-lint.yml
    - AR-030: codespell.yml
    - AR-031: copyright-check.yml + hack/*
    - AR-032: build-push-release.yml
    - AR-033: workflows-approve.yml
11. **AR-011** (client-go) ŌĆö generated via Makefile
12. **AR-007** (Python SDK)
13. **AR-008** (CLI toolkit)
14. **AR-010** (Integrations)

part.text:
I've updated **PLAN.md** to include AR-023 through AR-033. Here's a summary of the CI/CD architectural requirements:

| AR | Requirement | Files to Create |
|----|-------------|-----------------|
| AR-023 | Pull request build verification | `.github/workflows/main.yml` |
| AR-024 | Go lint on changed Go code | `.github/workflows/lint.yml`, `.golangci.yml` |
| AR-025 | Code generation check | `.github/workflows/codegen-check.yml` |
| AR-026 | Go test coverage reporting | `.github/workflows/test-coverage.yml` |
| AR-027 | E2E testing on Kind | `.github/workflows/e2e.yml`, `test/e2e/*` |
| AR-028 | Python SDK unit tests | `.github/workflows/python-sdk-tests.yml` |
| AR-029 | Python lint | `.github/workflows/python-lint.yml` |
| AR-030 | Spelling check (codespell) | `.github/workflows/codespell.yml` |
| AR-031 | Copyright header check | `.github/workflows/copyright-check.yml`, `hack/*` |
| AR-032 | Release image publication | `.github/workflows/build-push-release.yml` |
| AR-033 | Workflow approval for first-time contributors | `.github/workflows/workflows-approve.yml` |

**Key implementation notes:**
- All 11 workflows are under `.github/workflows/`
- E2E tests include Go (`e2e_test.go`) and Python (`test_codeinterpreter.py`)
- Copyright scripts require `hack/boilerplate.go.txt`, `hack/boilerplate.py.txt`, and `hack/update-copyright.sh`
- All workflows follow the GitHub Actions patterns specified in `specs/ci-cd/spec.md` and `specs/ci-cd/design.md`
